team_updates.yesterday: Observed API integration for client dashboard (user activity logs with Analytics Service) slowing down. Identified Ahmed & Sarah are stuck on inconsistent third-party API formats and are attempting to solve it in parallel without alignment.
team_updates.today: Facilitating resolution. Instructed Ahmed & Sarah to sync up post-standup, agree on a single approach, and work together. Suggested defining a consistent internal format if the API is unreliable. Reminded the team to raise blockers promptly.
